cbdc_intro_1: Dziko lathu likukhala ladigitala kwambiri, momwemonso ndalama zathu.
cbdc_intro_2: Izi zimafunsa funso: tikufuna ndalama zathu zadigitala zikhale zotani?
cbdc_intro_3: Mayiko ambiri akufufuza kutulutsa Ndalama Zadigitala za Banki ya Boma (CBDC) yomwe ndi ndalama zadigitala kwathunthu za ndalama zathu za boma zilipo.
cbdc_intro_4: Tiyeni tione kusiyana pakati pa mitundu iwiri ya ndalama zadigitala: Bitcoin ndi Ndalama Zadigitala za Banki ya Boma (Ma CBDC).
bitcoin_point_6: Ogwiritsa ntchito amatha kuthamanga ma node
point_1_summary_1: Bitcoin yapangidwa kukupatsani ulamuliro wathunthu wa ndalama zanu.
point_1_summary_2: Palibe amene angakuletseni kuchita malonda ndi Bitcoin.
point_1_summary_3: Ma CBDC apangidwa kupereka ulamuliro wathunthu kwa maboma ndi mabanki a boma pa ndalama zanu.
point_1_summary_4: Ma CBDC amaletsa chinsinsi chanu ndi ufulu wanu.
point_2_summary_1: Bitcoin sizithera ndipo ilibe malipiro a mwezi.
point_2_summary_3: Ma CBDC akathera, amakuletsani kusunga ndalama kwa tsogolo.
point_3_summary_1: Bitcoin ili ndi malire olimba a BTC 21 miliyoni yomwe idzakhaleko.
point_3_summary_2: Ma CBDC, mofanana ndi ndalama za boma zomwe timagwiritsa ntchito lero, alibe malire pa kuchuluka. Izi zimalola boma kuwonjezera ndalama.
point_4_summary_1: Ma adilesi a Bitcoin ndi odzibisa, kutanthauza kuti sakuphatikizidwa ndi dzina lanu lenileni. Ma CBDC amalumikizidwa mwachindunji ndi dzina lanu ndi chizindikiro chanu zomwe zimalola kuyang'anira ndi kuletsa kwa ndalama kwakukulu.
point_5_summary_2: Zikwi makumi a ma node odziimira okha amatsimikizira malamulo a netiwekiyo.
point_5_summary_3: Ma CBDC ali m'manja mwa boma ndi mabanki a boma, omwe amawatsatira kwathunthu.
point_6_summary_1: Bitcoin imalola aliyense kuthamanga node yomwe imatsimikizira kuti malamulo a netiweki akutsatidwa. Ma CBDC samalore aliyense kuthamanga ma node ndipo amadalira kukhulupirira boma ndi mabanki a boma.
point_7_summary_1: Bitcoin yapangidwa kuti ikhale yosatheka kuumitsa ndalama zanu. Ma CBDC apangidwa kuti zikhale zosavuta kwa maboma ndi mabanki a boma kuumitsa ndalama zanu.
point_8_summary_1: Bitcoin yapangidwa kukupatsani ulamuliro wathunthu wa ndalama zanu.
point_8_summary_2: Onetsetsani kuti mwachotsa ndalama zanu ku chikwama chanu.
point_8_summary_3: Mukasunga bitcoin yanu nokha, palibe amene angakuletseni kupeza ndalama zanu.
point_8_summary_4: Ma CBDC amafuna kuti mukhulupirire osunga, monga banki kapena boma, kusunga ndalama zanu.
point_9_summary_1: Bitcoin ili ndi malamulo a ndalama odalirika omwe ali mu khodi ndipo sangasinthidwe. Ma CBDC, monga ndalama zathu lero, ali ndi malamulo a ndalama omwe angasinthidwe mosavuta.
point_9_summary_2: Izi zimapangitsa kukwera kwa mitengo ndale zikasindikiza ndalama zambiri.
point_10_summary_1: Bitcoin ndi netiweki ya makompyuta yotetezeka kwambiri yomwe yakhalapo ndipo sinayambe yahackidwa. Ma CBDC amadalira maboma ndi mabanki kuteteza netiwekiyo, omwe ahackidwa nthawi zambiri m'mbiri.
